title: phalangium liliago var. algeriense
intro: Phalangium liliago var. algeriense, also known as Algerian bugloss, is a biennial plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae) that grows to be around 60-80 cm tall and has blue or white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Algerian bugloss include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Phalangium liliago var. algeriense can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
